description: Web app stile Jackbox per un gioco da tavolo su business e crescita personale (3-8 amici, dal vivo). Schermo comune (/host) + telefoni (/). Primo build: scheletro comune (lobby con codice stanza, realtime, state-machine, timer) + fase 'Dilemma di gruppo'. Esperienza social, niente vincitore, premi simpatici a fine partita. Stack: Node + Express + Socket.IO (TypeScript), React + Vite (TypeScript), stato in memoria.

userStories.title: Scaffolding monorepo server + client (TypeScript)
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a runnable server+client base so I can build features on top.
acceptanceCriteria: Repo with server/ (Node + Express + Socket.IO, TypeScript) and client/ (React + Vite, TypeScript)
npm run dev starts server and client in development
Production build: server serves the built client on a single port
Lint configured and passes
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Done by hand to de-risk iteration 1. TS npm-workspaces monorepo; server CommonJS (tsx dev, tsc build), client Vite ESM. typecheck+lint+test+build all green; prod server serves client/dist + /api/health verified.

userStories.title: Host crea stanza con codice e QR
userStories.description: As a host, I open /host and get a room with a shareable code so players can join.
acceptanceCriteria: Opening /host makes the server create a room with a unique 4-letter code
Host screen shows the code large + a QR code pointing to the join URL
Room state kept in memory on the server
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Giocatore entra dal telefono + lobby realtime
userStories.description: As a player, I join from my phone with code + nickname and appear in the lobby.
acceptanceCriteria: View / asks for room code + nickname
Wrong code shows a clear error; valid code enters the lobby
Player list updates in realtime on host and all phones via Socket.IO
Max 8 players; joining beyond that is blocked with a message
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Avvio partita + scelta numero dilemmi (3/4/5)
userStories.description: As a host, I pick how many dilemmas and start once there are at least 3 players.
acceptanceCriteria: Host has a selector for 3 / 4 / 5 dilemmas
Start button enabled only with >= 3 connected players
On start, state machine moves from LOBBY to PHASE_INTRO
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: State-machine di fase + timer lato server
userStories.description: As the system, I manage phase transitions with authoritative server timers broadcast to everyone.
acceptanceCriteria: States: LOBBY -> PHASE_INTRO -> DILEMMA_REVEAL -> VOTE_1 -> SPLIT_REVEAL -> DEFENSE -> VOTE_2 -> PHASE_RESULTS -> (loop) -> FINAL_AWARDS
Countdown computed server-side (expiry timestamp) and broadcast to host + phones
On timer expiry the phase advances automatically; host can also force-advance
Unit tests for state transitions
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Deck dei dilemmi: caricamento e pesca senza ripetizioni
userStories.description: As the system, I load the deck and draw dilemmas without repeats within a game.
acceptanceCriteria: Deck read from server/data/dilemmas.json (>=20 items, each with text + option A + option B)
Random draw without repeats within a single game
Unit tests for no-repeat draw
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Rivelazione dilemma sull'host
userStories.description: As a player, I see the dilemma and its two options on the shared screen.
acceptanceCriteria: PHASE_INTRO shows phase name + short rules for a few seconds
DILEMMA_REVEAL shows the dilemma text + option A / option B on the host
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Primo voto segreto dai telefoni
userStories.description: As a player, I secretly vote A or B from my phone.
acceptanceCriteria: In VOTE_1 each phone shows A / B and records one choice
Host shows only how many have voted (e.g. 5/6), never who voted what
Timer ~20s; advances on expiry or when everyone has voted
Vote changeable until the timer expires
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Rivelazione split (solo conteggi, niente identita)
userStories.description: As a player, I see how the room split without learning who voted what.
acceptanceCriteria: SPLIT_REVEAL shows the A vs B count on the host (e.g. 'A: 4 - B: 2')
No vote identities are revealed
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Auto-selezione difensori + turni di difesa a timer
userStories.description: As a selected player, I defend my side out loud while the app runs the timer.
acceptanceCriteria: In DEFENSE the server auto-selects 1 defender per side among those who voted that side
If a side has 0 votes, that side's defender is skipped
Host shows who is speaking + a 60-90s countdown per turn; turns run in sequence
Non-defender phones show 'sta parlando {name}'
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Secondo voto segreto + calcolo swing
userStories.description: As a player, after hearing the defenses I vote again and may switch sides.
acceptanceCriteria: In VOTE_2 each phone re-votes A/B (default = previous vote, changeable)
Server computes for each voter whether they switched side vs VOTE_1
Server computes net swing toward each side
Unit tests for vote tally and swing computation
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Risultati del dilemma + punteggio difensori
userStories.description: As a player, I see how votes changed and who was convincing.
acceptanceCriteria: PHASE_RESULTS shows before -> after on the host (e.g. 'A: 4->2, B: 2->4') and how many changed their mind
A side's defender earns +1 'convinzione' point per vote gained by their side after the defense
If the defender defended the minority side at split and gained votes, they also accrue 'provocatore' score
Unit tests for defender scoring
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Loop dei dilemmi e passaggio ai premi
userStories.description: As the system, I repeat the phase for N dilemmas then go to final awards.
acceptanceCriteria: After PHASE_RESULTS, if dilemmas remain -> new DILEMMA_REVEAL, otherwise -> FINAL_AWARDS
Scores (convinzione, provocatore) accumulate across dilemmas
Unit tests for the loop reaching FINAL_AWARDS
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Premi finali (calcolati + 1 votato)
userStories.description: As a group, at the end we see fun awards and vote one of them.
acceptanceCriteria: 'Il piu convincente' = player with most convinzione points (computed)
'Il piu provocatore' = player with most provocatore points (computed)
1 voted award: each phone votes a player (e.g. 'Il piu assurdo'), host shows the winner
Tie handling defined (e.g. show ex-aequo)
Celebratory host screen with the awards
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Riconnessione base
userStories.description: As a player who loses connection, I rejoin with the same code and keep identity and points.
acceptanceCriteria: Rejoining with same code + same nickname (or saved token) re-associates to the existing player
Scores and vote state are not lost on reconnect
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
